description_long: This is a two-story commercial building complex featuring two distinct facades, each with its own signage and architectural detailing. The left section has a brown tiled roof, a yellow and brown facade, and signage in Cyrillic, indicating a real estate agency and an auto school. The right section has a gray, weathered roof, a beige and white facade, and additional signage for a Honda dealership and repair services. Large windows are present on both sections, with some displaying advertisements and business names. The structure is primarily constructed from masonry and concrete, with visible window frames and doors. The building's exterior is adorned with various signs, banners, and window displays, giving it a vibrant, urban street presence.
description: A two-story commercial building with dual facades, prominent signage, and large street-facing windows, combining a real estate agency with other businesses.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance to the real estate agency, yellow signage, and a garage entrance to the left.
description_view_1: Side view revealing both building sections, with detailed facades, multiple business signs, and large street-level windows.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the weathered roof, back windows, and a large blue advertisement banner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, a balcony, and more signage, including a Honda dealership sign.
